title: Best Indian Web Series of All Time — Ranked
description: From Scam 1992 to Panchayat — every great Indian web series, ranked by Navras score.
intro: Indian web series have grown from an afterthought to a global phenomenon in under a decade. These are the ones that defined the format.

entries.blurb: The greatest Indian web series ever made. Not even close.

film.title: Scam 1992: The Harshad Mehta Story
film.verdict: The greatest Indian web series ever made. Not even close.

entries.blurb: The series that made rural India feel like home to everyone.

film.title: Panchayat S1-S3
film.verdict: The series that made rural India feel like home to everyone.

entries.blurb: India's most uncomfortable and necessary thriller.

film.title: Paatal Lok S1-S2
film.verdict: India's most uncomfortable and necessary thriller.

entries.blurb: The most tightly written Indian series of 2024.

film.title: IC 814: The Kandahar Hijack
film.verdict: The most tightly written Indian series of 2024.
